§6Reformate Gas§f is a gaseous product from §bVacuum Refinery§f processing.

§eObtaining:§f
• Vacuum Refinery processes petroleum into Reformate
• Reformate further processed to gas form

§eKey Use:§f
• Combined with §bChlorine§f in §bIndustrial Mixer§f
• Creates §bHigh-Performance Solvent§f

§aTip:§f The critical pathway to the best acidizer solvent for rare materials.
